script: for u in axel jose lia afrah; do echo === $u ===; sudo -u $u az login --identity 2>&1 | head -3; echo; sudo -u $u az account show --query name -o tsv 2>&1; echo; done; echo === Restart responders ===; sudo systemctl restart axel-responder.service jose-responder.service lia-responder.service afrah-responder.service; sleep 4; for u in axel jose lia afrah; do echo "  $u-responder: $(systemctl is-active $u-responder.service)"; done
